languages.text: {n}Глейто возникает рядом с нарушительницей из ниоткуда, словно призрак, и с хрустом смыкает челюсти на ее ноге. Уже падая, женщина успевает направить на вас автопистолет и выстрелить, прежде чем залп из оружия Соломона превращает ее голову в фонтан кровавых ошметков.{/n}

{n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Глейто возникает рядом с нарушительницей из ниоткуда, словно призрак, и с хрустом смыкает челюсти на ее ноге. Уже падая, женщина успевает направить на вас автопистолет и выстрелить, прежде чем залп из оружия Соломона превращает ее голову в фонтан кровавых ошметков.{/n}

{n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her lasgun at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

{n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her lasgun at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

{n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

languages.text: {n}グライトは幽霊のように空から現れ、彼女の足を噛み砕く。彼女は転倒する際に、ラスガンを向け、発砲するが、その直後、ソロモーンの銃弾が彼女の頭を粉々に砕いた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her lasgun at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: グレイトは幽霊のように空から現れ、彼女の足を噛み砕く。彼女は転倒する際に、ラスガンを向け、発砲するが、その直後、ソロモーンの銃弾が彼女の頭を粉々に砕いた。

languages.text: {n}格雷托如幽灵般凭空显现，一口咬住她的腿，骨头碎裂的声音骤然响起。可在倒下的瞬间，她仍奋力将自动手枪对准你，并扣动了扳机。然而，索罗蒙射出的子弹抢先击中她的头部，将她的头颅轰成一团飞溅的血雾碎肉。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}格雷托如幽灵般凭空显现，一口咬住她的腿，骨头碎裂的声音骤然响起。可在倒下的瞬间，她仍奋力将自动手枪对准你，并扣动了扳机。然而，索罗蒙射出的子弹抢先击中她的头部，将她的头颅轰成一团飞溅的血雾碎肉。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glaito parece materializarse de la nada, como un fantasma, e hinca sus colmillos en su pierna con un crujido. Mientras cae, consigue apuntarte con su pistola automática y disparar... antes de que el arma de Solomorne convierta su cabeza en una fuente de jirones ensangrentados.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Glaito parece materializarse de la nada, como un fantasma, e hinca sus colmillos en su pierna con un crujido. Mientras cae, consigue apuntarte con su pistola automática y disparar... antes de que el arma de Solomorne convierta su cabeza en una fuente de jirones ensangrentados.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glaito scheint wie ein Geist aus dem Nichts zu materialisieren und schnappt mit seinen Kiefern nach ihrem Bein. Im Fallen richtet sie ihre Maschinenpistole auf dich und feuert ... ehe ein Schuss aus Solomornes Waffe ihren Kopf in eine Fontäne aus Blut und Knochensplittern verwandelt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Glaito scheint wie ein Geist aus dem Nichts zu materialisieren und schnappt mit seinen Kiefern nach ihrem Bein. Im Fallen richtet sie ihre Maschinenpistole auf dich und feuert ... ehe ein Schuss aus Solomornes Waffe ihren Kopf in eine Fontäne aus Blut und Knochensplittern verwandelt."{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glaito semble se matérialiser devant vous comme par enchantement et referme sa mâchoire sur la jambe de la femme dans un craquement sec. En tombant, elle parvient à braquer son pistolet-mitrailleur sur vous et à faire feu, juste avant qu'une balle tirée par Solomorne ne transforme sa tête en fontaine de sang et de morceaux de cervelle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}

En tombant, elle parvient à braquer son pistolet-mitrailleur sur vous et à faire feu, juste avant qu'une balle tirée par Solomorne ne transforme sa tête en fontaine de sang et de morceaux de cervelle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Glaito, hayalet misali bir anda beliriyor. Çenesi, bir çatırtı eşliğinde kadının bacağına kenetleniyor. Kadın, düşerken ototabanca sana doğrultmayı ve ateşlemeyi başarıyor. Ancak Solomorne'un silahından çıkan bir mermi, kafasını kanlı parçalardan oluşan bir fıskiyeye çeviriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Glaito seems to materialise out of thin air, like a ghost, and clamps his jaws down on her leg with a crunch. As she falls, she manages to point her autopistol at you and fire — before a round from Solomorne's weapon turns her head into a fountain of bloody shreds.{/n}
